_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Abiltiy to interpret customer requirements and evaluate resource and system constraints to create solution design specifications.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data product design principles, including data product definition, consumer segmentation, interface design (APIs, subscriptions, files), SLA definition, and data product lifecycle.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-014 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-008 (OP, cosine: 0.491), DQ-S-007 (DQ, cosine: 0.473).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.403). Shared vocabulary: [design]. DCWF-only terms [abiltiy, constraints, create, customer, evaluate, interpret] vs WIDAI-only terms [apis, consumer, data, definition, files, interface] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.855 (P=0.854, R=0.856). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Abiltiy to interpret customer requirements and evaluate resource and system cons" and "Knowledge of data product design principles, including data product definition," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.508 > STS 0.403 (gap +0.106). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [design] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.9%. Shared tokens: [design]. DCWF-only: [abiltiy, constraints, create, customer, evaluate, interpret]. WIDAI-only: [apis, consumer, data, definition, files, interface].
